created_from_drive_handoff: ARD / Chityy / Sourceborn / IFR handoff v1 part 1 and part 2

truth.big_framework_status: designed and exposed; feed wiring still required for IFR/FII/PWOI/volume-delivery to control SELECT

core_layers: IFR damage and repair state machine
data_needed_parameters: PWOI participant OI and volume to present

decision_policy.select: Only active scanner gates can produce SELECT today.
decision_policy.watch: Useful but incomplete rows stay WATCH or DATA_NEEDED until proof and feed coverage exist.
decision_policy.blocked: Portfolio, correlation, freshness, volatility, target or safety gates can block.
decision_policy.data_needed: Never fake a missing feed. Record exact feed, column and loop.
decision_policy.archive: Duplicate, story-only, late or false-positive-heavy parameters are archived, not deleted.
